output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?numRaces WHERE {
  wd:Q9673 p:P157 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P157 ?season .
  ?season wdt:P31 wd:Q1556920 .
  ?season wdt:P580 ?startDate .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?startDate) , "2015"))
  ?season wdt:P1350 ?numRaces .
  FILTER(isNumeric(?numRaces))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?numRaces)
LIMIT 1
OFFSET 1
